title: ETL & Data Ingestion
description: The ETL and Data Ingestion module supports the transformation of source clinical data into the OMOP Common Data Model. It provides tools for schema mapping, concept mapping, source profiling, FHIR ingestion, and job monitoring to guide data engineers through the end-to-end process of preparing data for research.
tips: Complete source profiling before beginning schema mapping to understand the structure and content of your raw data.
Use the Schema Mapping tool to align source tables and fields to their corresponding OMOP CDM equivalents systematically.
Run Concept Mapping to resolve local source codes to OMOP standard vocabulary concepts before executing your ETL.
Monitor the Jobs Monitoring page throughout ingestion to detect and address errors before they propagate downstream.
For FHIR-based sources, use the FHIR Ingestion pipeline to transform HL7 FHIR resources directly into OMOP CDM tables.
